email_opening: I noticed your work leading executive transition programs at LHH.
email_body_core:
Hi Lauren,

I have been following your work at LHH, and I thought this might be useful for your transition cohorts.

Starting Monday helps outplacement teams enforce one measurable execution standard across targeting, narrative quality, and first-conversation readiness.

For Executive transition programs at LHH, the failure mode is high candidate activity but low qualified progression because first-touch narratives are inconsistent.

In recent executive cohorts, qualified-conversation rate improved after first-touch narrative standards were normalized across coaches.

The concrete proof point is a consistent first-conversation standard across high-variance senior cohorts.

If this is ignored, the cost is usually program activity without qualified progression, which lowers confidence in cohort outcomes.

For Executive transition programs, the operating asset is the executive cohort progression benchmark.

If useful, reply "send it" and I will send the executive cohort progression benchmark for your transition cohort. If not relevant, reply "pass" and I will close this out.

Rich
